List the components in the selected catalog.

Resolves the catalog via the shared source selector (default 'current') and
prints one row per component with its type, owner, system, and last execution
status. The filter flags narrow the set; output is sorted by component key.

--kind switches from the Component rows to the derived multi-kind entities
(API, Resource, System, Domain, Group, Environment, Composition) of that kind.

Examples:
  orun catalog list
  orun catalog list --source main
  orun catalog list --owner team/platform-edge
  orun catalog list --type cloudflare-worker
  orun catalog list --kind System
  orun catalog list --kind Environment
  orun catalog list --json

Exit codes:
  0  Listing rendered (possibly empty).
  1  Invalid selector.
  3  StateStore failure.
  6  Catalog not found.

Usage:
  orun catalog list [flags]

Flags:
      --catalog-snapshot string   Bypass refs; pin to an explicit catalogSnapshotKey
      --catalog-source string     Resolve catalog by ref selector (current|main|latest|branches/<name>|prs/<n>|cat-<key>)
      --domain string             Only components in this domain
      --json                      Stable machine-readable output
      --kind string               List entities of this kind (API|Resource|System|Domain|Group|Environment|Composition) instead of components
      --owner string              Only components with this owner
      --source string             Alias for --catalog-source
      --status string             Only components whose last execution has this status
      --system string             Only components in this system
      --type string               Only components of this type

Global Flags:
      --all                 Disable CWD-based component scoping; process all components
  -c, --config-dir string   Config directory for JobRegistry definitions (or set ORUN_CONFIG_DIR; use * or ** for recursive scanning)
  -i, --intent string       Intent file path (auto-discovered if not set) (default "intent.yaml")
